business.name: KW Spa
business.tagline: Massage therapy in downtown Jersey City
business.notice: Demo pricing below is editable and should be confirmed with the owner before publishing.

services.name: Back Massage
services.description: Focused relief for the neck, shoulders, and back with pressure adjusted to your comfort.

services.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.description: A firmer therapeutic session designed for chronic tension, tight muscles, and recovery support.

services.name: Reflexology
services.description: Targeted pressure-point work for the feet to encourage relaxation and whole-body balance.

services.name: Foot Massage
services.description: A calming foot-focused treatment for tired legs, long workdays, and reset moments.

reviews.name: Nitya N.
reviews.quote: Amazing price, phenomenal massage, and warm hospitality.

reviews.name: Nya G.
reviews.quote: Great deep tissue massage, easy online booking, fair pricing, and hot stones that felt amazing.

reviews.name: Annie H.
reviews.quote: Clean, flexible with appointment times, reasonable prices, and excellent deep tissue massage.

reviews.name: Beverly G.
reviews.quote: A calm, quiet, no-frills place with knowledgeable hands that got the knots out.

reviews.name: Evie F.

promos: Same-day appointments available when the schedule allows
Gift-card and package promotions can be added here

faq.question: Do I need an appointment?
faq.answer: Appointments are recommended, especially evenings and weekends. Walk-ins can be accepted when staff is available.

faq.question: Can I choose pressure level?
faq.answer: Yes. Tell the therapist if you prefer lighter, medium, or deeper pressure.

faq.question: Are prices final?
faq.answer: This portfolio version keeps prices editable. Confirm the current menu with KW Spa before publishing.
